link_text.description: Stores the value of the custom text for the custom_url

name.description: Contains the name that can be used to identify the caller

render_name_as_label.description: Stores whether the name will be shown in the screenpop

request_method.description: Stores the HTTP method of the external source parameters

token.description: Represents a dynamic value that can will be replaced by either a system data or a custom source

type_custom_parameter.description: Contains the type of information the screenpop will load (no additional data, System Data, Dynamic Link, External Data)

url.description: Stores the URL to fetch the external source parameters

url_parameters.description: Contains all the url custom params defined to concat to the custom url

name.description: Contains the name for the url_parameters

value.description: Contains the value for the url_parameters

permissions.description: Used when screenpops are allowed for userwise, this object contains which users are allowed and not allowed for a screenpop

all_users.description: Whether the screenpop allowed for all users in the account

allow.description: Specific list of users who are allowed the screenpop

deny.description: Specific list of users who are not allowed the screenpop

post_call_extension_time.description: Contains the time the screenpop will remain active when the temporal type is selected.

show_location_call_time.description: Flag field for location and local time of customer call
